h1.visual_description: Centered, all-caps, serif font with wide letter spacing, typically used for chapter titles.

h2.visual_description: Not present on this page, but inferred as standard serif bold or italic for sub-sections.

visual_matchers.pattern: Centered image followed by small-caps 'FIGURE' label and italicized description.
Small-caps text for labels within captions.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Author-date or descriptive photo credits within captions (e.g., 'Photo by author.')

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page numbers at the top left/right corners; Running headers centered at the top (e.g., 'CHAPTER 1').
